user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable flexi schedule settings, so that employees can work flexible schedules
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Flexi Schedule Settings screen; When I set "Do you support flexi schedule settings?" to Yes and Save; Then flexi scheduling is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable location based flexi schedule settings, so that flexi rules can vary by office location
acceptance_criteria: Given flexi scheduling is enabled; When I set "Do you support location based flexi schedule settings?" to Yes and Save; Then flexi settings can be configured per location

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable department based flexi schedule settings, so that flexi rules can vary by department
acceptance_criteria: Given flexi scheduling is enabled; When I set "Do you support department based flexi schedule settings?" to Yes and Save; Then flexi settings can be configured per department

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable position based flexi schedule settings, so that flexi rules can vary by position
acceptance_criteria: Given flexi scheduling is enabled; When I set "Do you support position based flexi schedule settings?" to Yes and Save; Then flexi settings can be configured per position

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to move items between selection lists using the transfer controls, so that I can assign which locations, departments or positions use flexi scheduling
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring scope for flexi scheduling; When I use the >>, >, < and << controls to move items between lists; Then the selected items are assigned accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration step, so that I can complete the attendance setup flow
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured flexi schedule settings; When I click Save & Next; Then the settings are saved and I proceed to the next screen
